results.rendered_html:
lūna p. p. [lū-kta]
1 Cut, lopped, severed, cut off.
2 Plucked, gathered (flowers &c.).
3 Destroyed.
4 Bitten, nibbled at.
5 Wounded.
— naṃ A tail.
